---
pagetitle: "About | Cultural Health Connect"
description: "Meet the founders of Cultural Health Connect and learn about our mission to bridge cultural gaps in healthcare in East County San Diego."
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-h1" role="heading" aria-level="1" data-i18n="page-header-about">About Cultural Health Connect</div>
  <p class="page-sub" data-i18n="about-sub">Bridging cultural gaps in healthcare, one conversation at a time.</p>
</div>

<div class="container">
  <p style="font-size:1.05rem; margin-top:1rem;" data-i18n="about-intro">
    Cultural Health Connect was founded with the aim of bridging cultural gaps in healthcare. We are dedicated to providing culturally relevant health and lifestyle education to immigrant communities in East County San Diego. Our mission is to empower community members by integrating traditional cultural values with modern healthcare practices.
  </p>

  <h2 class="section-heading" style="margin-top:2rem;" data-i18n="values-heading">What We Believe</h2>
  <div class="values-grid chc-reveal">
    <div class="value-card">
      <h3 data-i18n="value1-title">Culture Is an Asset</h3>
      <p data-i18n="value1-text">Traditional foods, faith, and family are strengths to build on—not obstacles to overcome. Good health advice works with culture, never against it.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="value-card">
      <h3 data-i18n="value2-title">Moderation Over Elimination</h3>
      <p data-i18n="value2-text">Sustainable habits beat strict rules. We help families enjoy the dishes they love in ways that support their health.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="value-card">
      <h3 data-i18n="value3-title">Evidence First</h3>
      <p data-i18n="value3-text">Every recommendation we make is grounded in peer-reviewed research and guidance from trusted health organizations.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="value-card">
      <h3 data-i18n="value4-title">Community Led</h3>
      <p data-i18n="value4-text">We listen before we teach. Community polling, local partnerships, and physician guidance shape everything we create.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <h2 class="section-heading" style="margin-top:2.5rem;" data-i18n="founders-heading">Our Founders &amp; Their Mission</h2>

  <div class="founder-profile chc-reveal">
    <img src="Images/CHC-Founders.jpg" alt="The three founders of Cultural Health Connect">
    <p data-i18n="founders-bio">Cultural Health Connect was founded by Adam Bisharat, Alex Ottersbach, and Isaac Cesena—three friends driven by a shared commitment to improving community health through culturally grounded education. The idea first took shape when Adam was volunteering at a diabetes clinic in El Cajon, where he saw how much of a difference respectful, patient-centered care could make. The clinic met people where they were, honored their cultural diets, and preached moderation over elimination. That approach inspired Adam to think beyond the walls of the clinic. He realized the same kind of care that changed lives in one building could reach far more people if it extended into the local community.<br><br>Together with Alex and Isaac, he launched Cultural Health Connect to make that vision real. The nonprofit focuses on Middle Eastern and Mexican communities in El Cajon, where chronic illnesses like diabetes and hypertension are common but often poorly addressed by mainstream health messaging. Through community polling, small business partnerships, and guidance from local physicians, the team works to offer health guidance that feels familiar, accessible, and respectful.<br><br>While we believe the most impactful relationships are formed through face-to-face interactions, the advice we give can benefit anyone—and we hope this webpage can broaden our reach both in El Cajon and beyond.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="cta-strip chc-reveal">
  <h2 data-i18n="about-cta-heading">Be Part of the Story</h2>
  <p data-i18n="about-cta-text">Our work grows through people who care—volunteers, health professionals, translators, and neighbors. Join us.</p>
  <p style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
    <a href="Contact.html" class="btn" data-i18n="btn-involved">Get Involved</a>
  </p>
</div>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-links">
    <a href="about.html" data-i18n="nav-about">About</a>
    <a href="Programs.html" data-i18n="nav-programs">Programs</a>
    <a href="Resources.html" data-i18n="nav-resources">Resources</a>
    <a href="FAQ.html" data-i18n="nav-faq">FAQ</a>
    <a href="Contact.html" data-i18n="nav-contact">Contact</a>
  </div>
  <span data-i18n="footer-short">© 2025 Cultural Health Connect</span>
  <span class="footer-disclaimer" data-i18n="footer-disclaimer">The content on this website is for general educational purposes only and is not medical advice. Always consult your doctor or another qualified health provider with questions about a medical condition.</span>
</footer>
```
